title: 2 x Oven Pride | Oven Cleaner - 500ml Complete Oven Cleaning Kit with Safety Gloves & Cleaning Bag - Cleans First Time - Oven Cleaner Heavy Duty - Degreases Oven Without Scrubbing (Pack of 2)
features: COMPLETE OVEN CLEANER – Our Oven Cleaner Heavy Duty formula effortlessly cuts through burnt-on grease and stubborn food residue, restoring ovens, grills, and baking trays to their sparkling best.
TOUGH ON GREASE – Our powerful, no-scrub Oven Cleaner breaks down even the most stubborn grime, making light work of cleaning oven racks, BBQs, and cooking surfaces.

TRUSTED FOR OVER 20 YEARS – Made by McBride, a leading European manufacturer, Our Oven Cleaner has been the UK’s go-to Oven Cleaner for over two decades. Proudly made in the UK and recognised with multiple industry awards.

EFFORTLESS CLEANING – The Complete Oven Cleaner Kit makes deep-cleaning simple. Comes with safety gloves & cleaning bag. Just apply, leave to work its magic, then wipe away for a gleaming, grease-free finish. No harsh scrubbing required.

MULTI PURPOSE OVEN CLEANER – This Oven Cleaner Heavy Duty formula is ideal for deep-cleaning ovens, outdoor BBQs, and even pizza ovens. Trusted by households for a professional-quality clean every time.
